name: Power Rangers SPD (RPG)
description:
A RPG about one of the most underrated Power Ranger series! SPD, EMERGENCY!

A open ended RPG now that i've revised it, added a few more things and hopefully made this a bit more correct. I don't usually correct my bot unless there's a serious problem with them or the lore, but this bot has a special place in my heart along with my future requests.
creator: HereFor@TfGuy
